summary: Completed comprehensive testing of Quote/Proposal System with Currency Settings for KOLOR STUDIO CRM. All 17 backend API tests passed. Frontend UI tested for Settings Modal, Quote Builder Modal, and Public Quote Page. Fixed URL routing mismatch for public quote links.
passed_tests: GET /api/settings - returns currency settings with currency, currencySymbol, currencyPosition, numberFormat, defaultTaxRate
PATCH /api/settings - updates currency settings (EUR, position AFTER, European format, tax rate)
GET /api/settings/currencies - returns list of 10 supported currencies (USD, EUR, GBP, NGN, etc.)
POST /api/leads/:leadId/quotes - creates quote with line items and totals calculation
POST /api/leads/:leadId/quotes - creates quote with currency override (NGN)
GET /api/leads/:leadId/quotes - returns all quotes for lead with createdBy currency info
POST /api/quotes/:quoteId/send - sends quote and changes status to SENT
GET /api/quotes/public/:quoteToken - returns public quote with merged currencySettings
Cannot accept already declined quote (400 error)
Settings Modal - displays currency dropdown, symbol position, number format options, tax rate, preview
Quote Builder Modal - line items, totals, currency settings collapsible section, payment terms, terms & conditions
Public Quote Page - displays quote with proper currency formatting ($100.00), accept/decline buttons visible
critical_code_review_comments: Currency settings merge correctly from user defaults and quote overrides in public quote API
Quote totals calculated correctly (subtotal, tax amount, total)
Validation properly rejects invalid inputs (empty line items, past dates, tax > 100)
Email notifications integrated via Resend for quote sent/accepted/declined
updated_files: /app/kolor-studio-v2/frontend/src/components/QuotesTab.tsx - Fixed URL routing from /quotes/ to /quote/ (singular) to match App.tsx routing
seed_data_creation: Multiple test quotes created during testing (DRAFT, SENT, VIEWED, ACCEPTED, DECLINED statuses)
context_for_next_testing_agent: Quote/Proposal system with currency settings is complete. Settings Modal accessible via gear icon in header. Quote Builder accessible in lead modal's Quotes tab. Public Quote page route is /quote/:quoteToken (singular). Currency formatting uses formatCurrency() utility with support for 10 currencies, 3 number formats, and before/after symbol positions.

settings_api.get_settings: Returns user currency settings + available currencies list
settings_api.update_settings: Updates currency, symbol, position, format, default tax rate

quotes_api.create_quote: Creates draft quote with line items and optional currency override
quotes_api.get_quotes: Returns quotes list for lead with creator's currency info
quotes_api.send_quote: Sends email and updates status to SENT
quotes_api.public_quote: Returns quote with merged currencySettings for display
quotes_api.accept_quote: Client accepts, updates lead to BOOKED

frontend_ui.settings_modal: Currency selection, symbol position, number format, tax rate, preview
frontend_ui.quote_builder: Line items editor, totals display, currency override option
